title: nepeta floccosa subsp. floccosa
intro: Nepeta floccosa subsp. floccosa, also known as Woolly Catmint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The medicinal properties of Nepeta floccosa subsp. floccosa include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its essential oil components. The health benefits associated with Woolly Catmint include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality. Woolly Catmint can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine and natural health practices.
